today.title: Today
today.emptyBody: Add your first plant and Sprout will build a gentle care schedule so you never miss a watering.
today.allCaughtUpBody: Nothing needs you right now. Sprout will let you know when it's time to check on someone.

garden.title: Garden
garden.emptyBody: Every jungle starts with one leaf. Snap a photo of a plant and it'll appear here as a cute little card.

reminderCard.waterTip: Feel the top 2″ of soil — water only if it's dry.
reminderCard.lastMoist: Last time it was still moist.
reminderCard.howFinger: Finger — poke to your second knuckle (~2″). Cool or damp? Wait. Dry? Water.
reminderCard.howChopstick: Chopstick — push in, pull out. Comes out clean and dry means it's time.
reminderCard.howLift: Lift the pot — light = dry, heavy = still wet. Learn the feel right after watering.

add.title: Add a plant
add.snapBody: Point your camera at the plant and Sprout will figure out what it is, then ask a couple of quick questions.
add.chooseSpeciesBody: Know what it is already? Pick it and skip the camera for now.
add.uncertainPrompt: Not 100% sure — which one looks right?

manualAdd.title: Choose a plant
manualAdd.whatKind: What kind of plant is it?
manualAdd.noMatches: No matches — try a different spelling.

plantQuestions.soilPlaceholder: Leave blank to use our pick: "{recommendation}"
plantQuestions.hasDrainage: The pot has a drainage hole
plantQuestions.recommendedMix: 🪴 We'll recommend a mix for you: {mix}

plant.wateringBody: Every {summer} days in the growing season (spring/summer), stretching to every {winter} days in fall/winter.
plant.noDrainageWarning: No drainage hole — water lightly and watch for sogginess.
plant.removeConfirm: Remove {name} from your garden? This can't be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.pushSubtitle: A gentle nudge each morning for what's due
settings.morningTimeHelp: Notifications are checked hourly, so the minutes above are rounded to the hour.
